boundary_assertions.detail: Phase 3X adds shell, routing, reports, and presentation adapters only.
boundary_assertions.name: presentation_only

boundary_assertions.detail: No Phase 3X frontend route calls exchange write clients.
boundary_assertions.name: no_direct_exchange_client

boundary_assertions.detail: Allowed preferences exclude thresholds, model weights, and risk limits.
boundary_assertions.name: preferences_are_presentation_only

components.name: Professional shell
components.purpose: Persistent environment, mode, freshness, 3W, and 3V context.

components.name: Command palette
components.purpose: Keyboard route navigation without domain mutations.

components.name: Status pill
components.purpose: Icon plus text status, never color-only.
components.states: blocked, degraded, failed, fresh, healthy, incomplete, live, no_trade, paper, stale, unknown

components.name: Probability pair
components.purpose: Keep market probability and model probability visually distinct.

components.name: Decision waterfall
components.purpose: Show Phase 3S to 3M to 3N gate outcomes in order.
components.states: proceed, skip, allow, reduce, block, unknown

components.name: State panel
components.purpose: Truthful loading, no-trade, stale, partial, blocked, and error states.
components.states: empty-valid, no-trade, unavailable, blocked, expired, error

open_findings: Phase 3W is not SYSTEM_PASS for production rollout.
Phase 3V readiness is not live-capital approved.
Accessibility manual evidence is not complete.
Visual regression baselines are not complete.
Performance budget evidence is not complete.
Rollback rehearsal evidence is not complete.

phase_3w_prerequisite.note: SYSTEM_PASS is required before production rollout claims.

routes.primary_job: Answer what to focus on today without hiding no-trade states.
routes.risk: Requires parity evidence before default production rollout
routes.source_authority: Phase 3U/3T read models and existing dashboard services

routes.risk: Legacy density and terminology remain until route migration

routes.action_authority: Read by default; existing review route for actions
routes.risk: Must keep fixed route ordering before /opportunities/{ticker}

routes.primary_job: Inspect lineage, probabilities, risk, and paper history
routes.risk: Market and model probability labels must remain distinct

routes.action_authority: Read-only diagnostics; CLI owns parsing mutations
routes.primary_job: Inspect parsed market legs and specialized link coverage
routes.risk: Coverage evidence must not imply live-trading readiness

routes.primary_job: Inspect paper positions and portfolio P&L
routes.risk: Gross, net, realized, and projected values must stay labeled
Predictive accuracy and economic profitability can be confused
Research candidates must not look tradable by default

routes.action_authority: No direct orders; existing guarded workflows only
routes.risk: LLM narrative must remain subordinate to structured evidence

routes.primary_job: Phase 3V readiness evidence and certificate state
routes.risk: Expired or incomplete certificates must block success claims
SYSTEM_INCOMPLETE must not look like production readiness

routes.primary_job: Unified system health and release-readiness overview
routes.risk: Shell rendering alone cannot imply healthy data
routes.source_authority: DB, Phase 3V, Phase 3W, Phase 3X status cards

routes.risk: Preferences must never change domain thresholds

market_freshness.description: No authoritative source value is available.
market_freshness.label: Unknown

paper_runtime.description: Paper-only runtime is reachable and execution guards are blocking demo/live orders.
paper_runtime.label: Healthy

blockers: Phase 3W is not SYSTEM_PASS for production rollout.
Phase 3V readiness is not live-capital approved.
Accessibility manual evidence is not complete.
Visual regression baselines are not complete.
Performance budget evidence is not complete.
Rollback rehearsal evidence is not complete.
phase_3x.next_action: Use Phase 3X as audit/preview until Phase 3W is SYSTEM_PASS.

system_status.description: Paper-only runtime is reachable and execution guards are blocking demo/live orders.
system_status.label: Healthy

blocked.description: A gate prevents the action or recommendation path.
blocked.label: Blocked

degraded.description: The source is available with warnings or partial data.
degraded.label: Degraded

failed.description: The source failed and must not be treated as current.
failed.label: Failed

fresh.description: Data is inside the fresh window.
fresh.label: Fresh

healthy.description: The source reports current usable data.
healthy.label: Healthy

no_trade.description: No candidate currently clears the required gates.
no_trade.label: No trade

stale.description: Data is outside the fresh window.
stale.label: Stale

unknown.description: No authoritative source value is available.
unknown.label: Unknown
